_meta.description: Server-synced game configuration: speed multipliers, timers, season dates

notes.description: These values are server-configurable defaults. The server sends the current config to clients on connection.
notes.shipSpeed: Ship linear and axis speed are multiplied by 0.95 by default (5% slower than raw physics)
notes.cannonBalls: Cannonball speed and distance multipliers are 1.0 (no adjustment by default)
